steps.title: Distribute both sides
steps.content:
Expand each side of the equation:
$$
8(12x-9)=96x-72
$$
$$
-12(6-8x)=-72+96x
$$

steps.title: Compare the two sides
steps.content: After rewriting the right side, the equation becomes $$ 96x-72=96x-72 $$ This identity is true for every value of $x$, so the equation has infinitely many solutions. The answer is C.
